title: Apple Inc. $AAPL Holdings Decreased by TLW Wealth Management LLC
sentences: Apple Inc. $AAPL Holdings Decreased by TLW Wealth Management LLC TLW Wealth Management LLC reduced its stake in Apple Inc.
($AAPL) by 6.5% during the third quarter, reducing its holdings to 50,473 shares valued at $12.85 million.
Despite this, Apple remains the firm's sixth-largest holding.

Meanwhile, other institutional investors like Vanguard Group Inc., State Street Corp, Geode Capital Management LLC, Norges Bank, and Northern Trust Corp significantly increased their positions in Apple.
